title: hieracium farinifloccum
intro: Hieracium farinifloccum, also known as the hairy hawk's beard or yellow hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hieracium farinifloccum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
